notableEvents.label: Andy Pages reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto. Max Muncy to 3rd. Andy Pages to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Alex Freeland GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Freeland grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Max Muncy scores. Andy Pages out at 2nd. Alex Freeland out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Blue Jays challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Kyle Tucker steals (3) 3rd base. Teoscar Hernández steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Shohei Ohtani singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Josh Fleming. Shohei Ohtani to 2nd. Shohei Ohtani advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Josh Fleming.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto. Max Muncy to 3rd. Andy Pages to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kazuma Okamoto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kazuma Okamoto grounds into a double play, shortstop Hyeseong Kim to second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 2nd. Kazuma Okamoto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Jesús Sánchez called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Heineman plunked
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Heineman hit by pitch. Daulton Varsho to 3rd. Myles Straw to 2nd.
